verses.latin_vulgate: Intulit igitur Salomon omnia quæ voverat David pater suus : argentum, et aurum, et universa vasa posuit in thesauris domus Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּשְׁלַם֙ כׇּל־הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֥ה שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לְבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה {ס} וַיָּבֵ֨א שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה אֶת־קׇדְשֵׁ֣י ׀ דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֗יו וְאֶת־הַכֶּ֤סֶף וְאֶת־הַזָּהָב֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֔ים נָתַ֕ן בְּאֹצְר֖וֹת בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then Solomon brought in all those things that David his father had vowed, the silver, and the gold, and all the vessels he put among the treasures of the house of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin kaikki työ täytettiin minkä Salomo teki Herran huoneesen, niin antoi Salomo sinne tuottaa kaikki, mitä hänen isänsä David pyhittänyt oli: hopian, kullan, ja kaikki astiat, ja pani ne Jumalan huoneen tavarain sekaan.
verses.king_james: Thus all the work that Solomon made for the house of the Lord was finished: and Solomon brought in all the things that David his father had dedicated; and the silver, and the gold, and all the instruments, put he among the treasures of the house of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post quæ congregavit majores natu Israël, et cunctos principes tribuum, et capita familiarum de filiis Israël in Jerusalem, ut adducerent arcam fœderis Domini de civitate David, quæ est Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָז֩ יַקְהֵ֨יל שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה אֶת־זִקְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל וְאֶת־כׇּל־רָאשֵׁ֨י הַמַּטּ֜וֹת נְשִׂיאֵ֧י הָאָב֛וֹת לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אֶל־יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם לְֽהַעֲל֞וֹת אֶת־אֲר֧וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֛ה מֵעִ֥יר דָּוִ֖יד הִ֥יא צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after this he gathered together the ancients of Israel and all the princes of the tribes, and the heads of the families, of the children of Israel to Jerusalem, to bring the ark of the covenant of the Lord out of the city of David, which is Sion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin kutsui Salomo kaikki vanhimmat Israelissa kokoon, ja kaikki sukukuntain päämiehet, Israelin lasten isäin esimiehet, Jerusalemiin, tuomaan Herran liitonarkkia Davidin kaupungista, se on Zion.
verses.king_james: Then Solomon assembled the elders of Israel, and all the heads of the tribes, the chief of the fathers of the children of Israel, unto Jerusalem, to bring up the ark of the covenant of the Lord out of the city of David, which is Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venerunt itaque ad regem omnes viri Israël in die solemni mensis septimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקָּהֲל֧וּ אֶל־הַמֶּ֛לֶךְ כׇּל־אִ֥ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בֶּחָ֑ג ה֖וּא הַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הַשְּׁבִעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the men of Israel came to the king in the solemn day of the seventh month.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki Israelin miehet kokoontuivat kuninkaan tykö juhlapäivinä, joka oli seitsemäntenä kuukautena.
verses.king_james: Wherefore all the men of Israel assembled themselves unto the king in the feast which was in the seventh month.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venissent cuncti seniorum Israël, portaverunt Levitæ arcam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֕אוּ כֹּ֖ל זִקְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ הַלְוִיִּ֖ם אֶת־הָאָרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when all the ancients of Israel were come, the Levites took up the ark,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki vanhimmat Israelista tulivat; ja Leviläiset nostivat arkin ylös,
verses.king_james: And all the elders of Israel came; and the Levites took up the ark.

verses.latin_vulgate: et intulerunt eam, et omnem paraturam tabernaculi. Porro vasa sanctuarii, quæ erant in tabernaculo, portaverunt sacerdotes cum Levitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲל֤וּ אֶת־הָאָרוֹן֙ וְאֶת־אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד וְאֶת־כׇּל־כְּלֵ֥י הַקֹּ֖דֶשׁ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּאֹ֑הֶל הֶעֱל֣וּ אֹתָ֔ם הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים הַלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And brought it in, together with all the furniture of the tabernacle. And the priests with the Levites carried the vessels of the sanctuary, which were in the tabernacle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kantoivat arkin ylös ja seurakunnan majan, ja kaikki pyhät astiat, jotka majassa olivat: ne kantoivat papit ja Leviläiset ylös.
verses.king_james: And they brought up the ark, and the tabernacle of the congregation, and all the holy vessels that were in the tabernacle, these did the priests and the Levites bring up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex autem Salomon, et universus cœtus Israël, et omnes qui fuerunt congregati ante arcam, immolabant arietes et boves absque ullo numero : tanta enim erat multitudo victimarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֗ה וְכׇל־עֲדַ֧ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל הַנּוֹעָדִ֥ים עָלָ֖יו לִפְנֵ֣י הָאָר֑וֹן מְזַבְּחִים֙ צֹ֣אן וּבָקָ֔ר אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־יִסָּפְר֛וּ וְלֹ֥א יִמָּנ֖וּ מֵרֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Solomon and all the assembly of Israel and all that were gathered together before the ark, sacrificed rams, and oxen without number: so great was the multitude of the victims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuningas Salomo ja kaikki Israelin kokous, joka oli tullut kokoon hänen tykönsä arkin eteen, uhrasivat lampaita ja härkiä niin monta, ettei yksikään lukea eli laskea taitanut.
verses.king_james: Also king Solomon, and all the congregation of Israel that were assembled unto him before the ark, sacrificed sheep and oxen, which could not be told nor numbered for multitude.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et intulerunt sacerdotes arcam fœderis Domini in locum suum, id est, ad oraculum templi, in Sancta sanctorum subter alas cherubim :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֣יאוּ הַ֠כֹּהֲנִ֠ים אֶת־אֲר֨וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֧ה אֶל־מְקוֹמ֛וֹ אֶל־דְּבִ֥יר הַבַּ֖יִת אֶל־קֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֑ים אֶל־תַּ֖חַת כַּנְפֵ֥י הַכְּרוּבִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests brought in the ark of the covenant of the Lord into its place, that is, to the oracle of the temple, into the holy of holies under the wings of the cherubims:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit kantoivat Herran liitonarkin siallensa huoneen kuoriin, kaikkein pyhimpään, Kerubimein siipein alle.
verses.king_james: And the priests brought in the ark of the covenant of the Lord unto his place, to the oracle of the house, into the most holy place, even under the wings of the cherubims:

verses.latin_vulgate: ita ut cherubim expanderent alas suas super locum in quo posita erat arca, et ipsam arcam tegerent cum vectibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֤וּ הַכְּרוּבִים֙ פֹּרְשִׂ֣ים כְּנָפַ֔יִם עַל־מְק֖וֹם הָאָר֑וֹן וַיְכַסּ֧וּ הַכְּרוּבִ֛ים עַל־הָאָר֥וֹן וְעַל־בַּדָּ֖יו מִלְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So that the cherubims spread their wings over the place, in which the ark was set, and covered the ark itself and its staves.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että Kerubimit levittivät siipensä arkin paikan päälle. Ja Kerubimit peittivät arkin korentoinensa ylhäältä päin.
verses.king_james: For the cherubims spread forth their wings over the place of the ark, and the cherubims covered the ark and the staves thereof above.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vectium autem quibus portabatur arca, quia paululum longiores erant, capita parebant ante oraculum : si vero quis paululum fuisset extrinsecus, eos videre non poterat. Fuit itaque arca ibi usque in præsentem diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּאֲרִ֘יכוּ֮ הַבַּדִּים֒ וַיֵּרָאוּ֩ רָאשֵׁ֨י הַבַּדִּ֤ים מִן־הָאָרוֹן֙ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י הַדְּבִ֔יר וְלֹ֥א יֵרָא֖וּ הַח֑וּצָה וַֽיְהִי־שָׁ֔ם עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the ends of the staves wherewith the ark was carried, because they were some thing longer, were seen before the oracle: but if a man were a little outward, he could not see them. So the ark has been there unto this day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta korennot olivat niin pitkät, että niiden päät näkyivät kuorin eteen arkista, mutta ei heitä ulkoiselta puolelta näkynyt; ja ne ovat siellä tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And they drew out the staves of the ark, that the ends of the staves were seen from the ark before the oracle; but they were not seen without. And there it is unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nihilque erat aliud in arca, nisi duæ tabulæ quas posuerat Moyses in Horeb, quando legem dedit Dominus filiis Israël egredientibus ex Ægypto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֚ין בָּאָר֔וֹן רַ֚ק שְׁנֵ֣י הַלֻּח֔וֹת אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן מֹשֶׁ֖ה בְּחֹרֵ֑ב אֲשֶׁ֨ר כָּרַ֤ת יְהֹוָה֙ עִם־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בְּצֵאתָ֖ם מִמִּצְרָֽיִם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And there was nothing else in the ark but the two tables which Moses put there at Horeb when the Lord gave the law to the children of Israel, at their coming out of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja arkissa ei ollut muuta mitään, vaan kaksi taulua, jotka Moses oli sinne pannut Horebissa, Herran tehdessä liittoa Israelin lasten kanssa, kuin he Egyptistä läksivät.
verses.king_james: There was nothing in the ark save the two tables which Moses put therein at Horeb, when the Lord made a covenant with the children of Israel, when they came out of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressis autem sacerdotibus de sanctuario (omnes enim sacerdotes qui ibi potuerant inveniri, sanctificati sunt : nec adhuc in illo tempore vices et ministeriorum ordo inter eos divisus erat),
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י בְּצֵ֥את הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים מִן־הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ כִּ֠י כׇּל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֤ים הַֽנִּמְצְאִים֙ הִתְקַדָּ֔שׁוּ אֵ֖ין לִשְׁמ֥וֹר לְמַחְלְקֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when the priests were come out of the sanctuary, for all the priests that could be found there, were sanctified: and as yet at that time the courses and orders of the ministries were not divided among them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, kuin papit tulivat pyhästä ulos; (sillä kaikki papit, jotka silloin läsnä olivat, pyhittivät itsensä, niin ettei heidän järjestyksestänsä eroitusta pitänyt pidettämän.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when the priests were come out of the holy place: (for all the priests that were present were sanctified, and did not then wait by course:

verses.latin_vulgate: tam Levitæ quam cantores, id est, et qui sub Asaph erant, et qui sub Eman, et qui sub Idithun, filii et fratres eorum vestiti byssinis, cymbalis, et psalteriis, et citharis concrepabant, stantes ad orientalem plagam altaris : et cum eis sacerdotes centum viginti canentes tubis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַלְוִיִּ֣ם הַמְשֹׁרְרִ֣ים לְכֻלָּ֡ם לְאָסָ֡ף לְהֵימָ֣ן לִ֠ידֻת֠וּן וְלִבְנֵיהֶ֨ם וְלַאֲחֵיהֶ֜ם מְלֻבָּשִׁ֣ים בּ֗וּץ בִּמְצִלְתַּ֙יִם֙ וּבִנְבָלִ֣ים וְכִנֹּר֔וֹת עֹמְדִ֖ים מִזְרָ֣ח לַמִּזְבֵּ֑חַ וְעִמָּהֶ֤ם כֹּֽהֲנִים֙ לְמֵאָ֣ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֔ים (מחצררים) [מַחְצְרִ֖ים] בַּחֲצֹצְרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Both the Levites and the singing men, that is, both they that were under Asaph, and they that were under Heman, and they that were under Idithun, with their sons, and their brethren, clothed with fine linen, sounded with cymbals, and psalteries, and harps, standing on the east side of the altar, and with them a hundred and twenty priests, sounding with trumpets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Leviläiset veisaajat kaikki Asaphin, Hemanin, Jedutunin, ja heidän lapsensa ja veljensä, olivat puetetut kalliilla liinavaatteella, soittivat symbaleilla, psaltareilla, harpuilla, ja seisoivat itään päin alttaria, ja heidän tykönänsä sata ja kaksikymmentä pappia, jotka puhalsivat vaskitorviin).
verses.king_james: Also the Levites which were the singers, all of them of Asaph, of Heman, of Jeduthun, with their sons and their brethren, being arrayed in white linen, having cymbals and psalteries and harps, stood at the east end of the altar, and with them an hundred and twenty priests sounding with trumpets:)

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur cunctis pariter, et tubis, et voce, et cymbalis, et organis, et diversi generis musicorum concinentibus, et vocem in sublime tollentibus, longe sonitus audiebatur, ita ut cum Dominum laudare cœpissent et dicere : Confitemini Domino quoniam bonus, quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus : impleretur domus Dei nube,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י כְ֠אֶחָ֠ד (למחצצרים) [לַמְחַצְּרִ֨ים] וְלַמְשֹׁרְרִ֜ים לְהַשְׁמִ֣יעַ קוֹל־אֶחָ֗ד לְהַלֵּ֣ל וּלְהֹדוֹת֮ לַיהֹוָה֒ וּכְהָרִ֣ים ק֠וֹל בַּחֲצֹצְר֨וֹת וּבִמְצִלְתַּ֜יִם וּבִכְלֵ֣י הַשִּׁ֗יר וּבְהַלֵּ֤ל לַֽיהֹוָה֙ כִּ֣י ט֔וֹב כִּ֥י לְעוֹלָ֖ם חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְהַבַּ֛יִת מָלֵ֥א עָנָ֖ן בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So when they all sounded together, both with trumpets, and voice, and cymbals, and organs, and with divers kind of musical instruments, and lifted up their voice on high: the sound was heard afar off, so that when they began to praise the Lord, and to say: Give glory to the Lord for he is good, for his mercy endureth for ever: the house of God was filled with a cloud.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja soittajain ja veisaajain ääni kuului soveliaasti yhteen niinkuin yhden ääni, kiittäin ja kunnioittain Herraa; ja kuin vaskitorven, symbalein ja muiden harppuin ääni hänensä korotti, kiittäissä Herraa, että hän on hyvä, ja hänen laupiutensa pysyy ijankaikkiseen, silloin Herran huone täytettiin pilvellä,
verses.king_james: It came even to pass, as the trumpeters and singers were as one, to make one sound to be heard in praising and thanking the Lord; and when they lifted up their voice with the trumpets and cymbals and instruments of musick, and praised the Lord, saying, For he is good; for his mercy endureth for ever: that then the house was filled with a cloud, even the house of the Lord;

verses.latin_vulgate: nec possent sacerdotes stare et ministrare propter caliginem. Compleverat enim gloria Domini domum Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יָכְל֧וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֛ים לַעֲמ֥וֹד לְשָׁרֵ֖ת מִפְּנֵ֣י הֶעָנָ֑ן כִּֽי־מָלֵ֥א כְבוֹד־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Nor could the priests stand and minister by reason of the cloud. For the glory of the Lord had filled the house of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ettei papit saaneet seisoa ja palvella pilven tähden; sillä Herran kunnia täytti Jumalan huoneen.
verses.king_james: So that the priests could not stand to minister by reason of the cloud: for the glory of the Lord had filled the house of God.
